description: Agent-first MCP server for WeChat Mini Program debugging & automation via WeChat DevTools.
name: io.github.Chaixueyuan/weapp-agent-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Automation WebSocket endpoint for the 'connect' flow (e.g. ws://localhost:9420). When a local endpoint is not listening and auto-launch is enabled, mp_ensureConnection may start DevTools if it can resolve a project.
environmentVariables.name: WEAPP_WS_ENDPOINT

environmentVariables.description: Force 'launch' or 'connect' mode. Defaults to 'launch' unless WEAPP_WS_ENDPOINT is set.
environmentVariables.name: WEAPP_AUTOMATOR_MODE

environmentVariables.description: Optional Mini Program project directory used by launch and local auto-launch flows. The server can also resolve a persisted default, a recent project, or the current working directory.
environmentVariables.name: WEAPP_PROJECT_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Optional override for the WeChat DevTools CLI binary path (e.g. /Applications/wechatwebdevtools.app/Contents/MacOS/cli on macOS).
environmentVariables.name: WECHAT_DEVTOOLS_CLI_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Automation websocket port passed to 'cli auto --auto-port' in launch mode (default 9420).
environmentVariables.name: WEAPP_DEVTOOLS_PORT

environmentVariables.description: Milliseconds passed to miniprogram-automator when launching WeChat DevTools.
environmentVariables.name: WEAPP_DEVTOOLS_TIMEOUT

environmentVariables.description: Optional account passed to miniprogram-automator launch.
environmentVariables.name: WEAPP_AUTO_ACCOUNT

environmentVariables.description: Whether launch mode should trust the project. Accepts true/false, 1/0, yes/no, or on/off.
environmentVariables.name: WEAPP_TRUST_PROJECT

environmentVariables.description: Additional whitespace-separated CLI arguments passed during launch.
environmentVariables.name: WEAPP_DEVTOOLS_ARGS

environmentVariables.description: Optional working directory passed to the DevTools launch process.
environmentVariables.name: WEAPP_DEVTOOLS_CWD

environmentVariables.description: Whether to close or disconnect the automator session after each tool call. Accepts true/false, 1/0, yes/no, or on/off.
environmentVariables.name: WEAPP_AUTOCLOSE

environmentVariables.description: Allow mp_ensureConnection to launch local WeChat DevTools with cli auto when the configured local automation port is not listening. Defaults to enabled; set false to disable.
environmentVariables.name: WEAPP_AUTOLAUNCH

environmentVariables.description: Milliseconds to wait for a locally auto-launched automation port (default 45000).
environmentVariables.name: WEAPP_LAUNCH_TIMEOUT

environmentVariables.description: Milliseconds to wait for an automator websocket connection (default 45000).
environmentVariables.name: WEAPP_CONNECT_TIMEOUT
